items.titleZh: 儿童脊柱关节炎药物治疗的最新进展
items.abstractZh: 青少年脊柱关节炎（JSpA）是指一组在儿童和青少年时期影响外周关节和中轴骨骼的异质性炎症性疾病。根据国际风湿病协会联盟（ILAR）分类，附着点炎相关关节炎（ERA）和青少年银屑病关节炎（JPsA）作为青少年特发性关节炎（JIA）的亚型，被纳入该组。它们可能与人类白细胞抗原（HLA）B27阳性相关。除肌肉骨骼受累外，伴随疾病的病理表现，如银屑病、葡萄膜炎和炎症性肠病，显著影响患者的生活质量和临床医生的治疗方法。针对JSpA患者制定的治疗指南主要涉及非甾体抗炎药（NSAIDs）、传统改善病情抗风湿药（csDMARDs）和肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂（TNFi）的使用。然而，并非所有患者对现有疗法均有充分应答或耐受，这凸显了对新型治疗选择的需求。对免疫发病机制理解的最新进展推动了新治疗靶点的开发，包括TNF抑制剂、白细胞介素（IL）-17/IL-23阻断剂和Janus激酶抑制剂。其中几种药物，包括司库奇尤单抗，现已获批用于治疗ERA和JPsA。然而，由于专门评估JSpA的开放标签和随机对照试验数量有限，当前治疗策略也参考了其他JIA亚型和成人研究的证据。在开发新型治疗药物的同时，基于可靠试验数据扩大现有生物制剂的获批适应症，可能会拓宽治疗选择，并最终改善JSpA患者的预后。

items.title: Serum sialic acid binding immunoglobulin-like lectin-1 (sSIGLEC-1) in Egyptian patients with lupus nephritis: correlation with renal activity in non-European ancestry.
items.abstract: Serum sialic acid binding immunoglobulin-like lectin-1 (sSIGLEC-1) is a type I interferon-associated biomarker previously linked to lupus nephritis (LN) in European ancestry populations, but its utility in non-European cohorts remains poorly defined. This study aimed to validate the association of sSIGLEC-1 with LN in Egyptian SLE patients (non-European ancestry) and to test its correlation with world health organization (WHO) pathological classes, chronic kidney disease (CKD) stages, systemic lupus international collaborating clinics-renal activity score (SLICC-RAS), systemic lupus erythematosus disease activity index (SLEDAI), 24-hour urinary protein and proinflammatory cytokines. This cross-sectional study included 80 SLE patients (47 with LN, 33 without LN) and 20 healthy controls. Renal biopsy was classified according to WHO criteria. Estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) and CKD stages were calculated. Median levels of sSIGLEC-1 were significantly higher in SLE patients than controls (113.5 vs. 11.2 pg/mL) and in LN patients than non-LN patients (117.7 vs. 110.0 pg/mL). Multivariable logistic regression confirmed sSIGLEC-1 as an independent predictor of LN (OR = 1.02, p = 0.04). sSIGLEC-1 correlated positively with SLEDAI (r = 0.26), SLICC-RAS (r = 0.31), and proinflammatory cytokines (IL-1β, IL-6, TNF-α), but did not correlate with 24-hour urinary protein (r = - 0.175). However, no significant differences in sSIGLEC-1 were observed across WHO pathological classes or CKD stages. ROC analysis showed poor discriminative ability for LN (AUC = 0.6928, sensitivity 93.6%, specificity 39.4%). In Egyptian SLE patients, sSIGLEC-1 is elevated in LN and correlates with disease activity but does not reflect histological severity or chronic kidney damage. Its low specificity limits diagnostic utility; however, high sensitivity suggests potential as a rule-out screening test for LN in non-European populations.

items.titleZh: 埃及狼疮肾炎患者血清唾液酸结合免疫球蛋白样凝集素-1（sSIGLEC-1）：与非欧洲裔肾脏活动性的相关性
items.abstractZh: 血清唾液酸结合免疫球蛋白样凝集素-1（sSIGLEC-1）是一种I型干扰素相关生物标志物，先前已与欧洲裔人群的狼疮肾炎（LN）相关，但其在非欧洲裔队列中的效用仍不明确。本研究旨在验证sSIGLEC-1与埃及SLE患者（非欧洲裔）LN的关联，并测试其与世界卫生组织（WHO）病理分型、慢性肾脏病（CKD）分期、系统性红斑狼疮国际协作诊所-肾脏活动评分（SLICC-RAS）、系统性红斑狼疮疾病活动指数（SLEDAI）、24小时尿蛋白和促炎细胞因子的相关性。这项横断面研究包括80例SLE患者（47例伴LN，33例无LN）和20例健康对照。肾活检根据WHO标准分类。计算估算肾小球滤过率（eGFR）和CKD分期。sSIGLEC-1中位水平在SLE患者中显著高于对照组（113.5 vs. 11.2 pg/mL），在LN患者中高于非LN患者（117.7 vs. 110.0 pg/mL）。多变量逻辑回归证实sSIGLEC-1是LN的独立预测因子（OR = 1.02，p = 0.04）。sSIGLEC-1与SLEDAI（r = 0.26）、SLICC-RAS（r = 0.31）和促炎细胞因子（IL-1β、IL-6、TNF-α）呈正相关，但与24小时尿蛋白无相关性（r = -0.175）。然而，在不同WHO病理分型或CKD分期之间未观察到sSIGLEC-1的显著差异。ROC分析显示对LN的区分能力较差（AUC = 0.6928，敏感性93.6%，特异性39.4%）。在埃及SLE患者中，sSIGLEC-1在LN中升高并与疾病活动性相关，但不反映组织学严重程度或慢性肾脏损伤。其低特异性限制了诊断效用；然而，高敏感性提示其作为非欧洲裔人群LN排除筛查试验的潜力。

items.title: Instrument selection for the assessment of peripheral arthritis in axial and peripheral spondyloarthritis: an ASAS project.
items.abstract: To identify the most appropriate instrument to assess disease activity related to peripheral arthritis in axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) and peripheral spondyloarthritis (pSpA) in clinical research. This Assessment of Spondyloarthritis International Society (ASAS) project followed the Outcome Measures in Rheumatology (OMERACT) framework. Candidate instruments were identified through a systematic literature review (SLR). Domain match and feasibility were assessed by a working group (WG). A second SLR evaluated measurement properties (construct validity, test-retest reliability, responsiveness, clinical trial discrimination, and thresholds of meaning). Additional analyses were performed using individual patient data from randomised controlled trials (RCTs). Evidence was synthesised in summary of measurement properties tables, followed by a WG discussion and ASAS consensus voting. Composite disease activity instruments consistently outperformed single-item measures. Evidence from the second SLR was limited, particularly for axSpA with peripheral arthritis, but analyses of 13 RCTs strengthened the evidence. In both axSpA and pSpA, composite instruments, particularly the Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Disease Activity Index (BASDAI), Axial Spondyloarthritis Disease Activity Score (ASDAS), and Disease Activity index for Psoriatic Arthritis based on 44 joints (DAPSA44), showed better construct validity, responsiveness, and clinical trial discrimination than joint counts alone. Clinical trial discrimination was particularly better for DAPSA44, making it the best-performing instrument across all measurement properties. Following ASAS voting, DAPSA44 was the preferred instrument, receiving 92% agreement for axSpA and 97% for pSpA. DAPSA44 demonstrated the most adequate measurement performance across axSpA and pSpA and was endorsed by ASAS as the recommended instrument for assessing disease activity related to peripheral arthritis in pSpA clinical research. Future clinical trials and research studies should report DAPSA44 when analysing disease activity related to peripheral arthritis in SpA.

items.titleZh: 中轴和外周脊柱关节炎中外周关节炎评估工具的选择：一项ASAS项目
items.abstractZh: 旨在确定临床研究中评估中轴脊柱关节炎（axSpA）和外周脊柱关节炎（pSpA）外周关节炎疾病活动度的最合适工具。这项国际脊柱关节炎评估协会（ASAS）项目遵循风湿病学结局指标（OMERACT）框架。通过系统性文献综述（SLR）确定候选工具。工作组（WG）评估了领域匹配性和可行性。第二次SLR评估了测量特性（结构效度、重测信度、反应性、临床试验区分能力和意义阈值）。使用随机对照试验（RCT）的个体患者数据进行额外分析。证据综合在测量特性汇总表中，随后进行WG讨论和ASAS共识投票。复合疾病活动度工具始终优于单项测量指标。第二次SLR的证据有限，特别是对于伴有外周关节炎的axSpA，但13项RCT的分析加强了证据。在axSpA和pSpA中，复合工具，特别是Bath强直性脊柱炎疾病活动指数（BASDAI）、中轴脊柱关节炎疾病活动评分（ASDAS）和基于44个关节的银屑病关节炎疾病活动指数（DAPSA44），在结构效度、反应性和临床试验区分能力方面优于单独的关节计数。DAPSA44的临床试验区分能力尤其更好，使其成为所有测量特性中表现最佳的工具。在ASAS投票后，DAPSA44是首选工具，在axSpA中获得92%的同意，在pSpA中获得97%的同意。DAPSA44在axSpA和pSpA中表现出最充分的测量性能，并被ASAS推荐为pSpA临床研究中评估外周关节炎疾病活动度的工具。未来的临床试验和研究在分析SpA中外周关节炎相关疾病活动度时应报告DAPSA44。

items.title: Cancer-associated dermatomyositis: A scoping review of the literature.
items.abstract: Dermatomyositis is an inflammatory muscle disease with distinctive skin changes and a strong association with cancer, but the mechanisms behind this link and predictors of malignancy remain unclear. To summarize current evidence on the relationship between dermatomyositis and cancer, including epidemiology, clinical and serologic predictors, histopathology, and prognosis. A comprehensive search of PubMed, Scopus, and Cochrane was performed according to PRISMA-ScR recommendations. Eligible studies were systematically screened, and relevant data were charted and descriptively summarized. Fifty-nine studies met the criteria. Over half of cancers occurred within one year of dermatomyositis onset, and nearly 90% within three years. Genitourinary, gastrointestinal, and lung cancers were most common. Higher risk was linked to older age, male sex, dysphagia, severe skin disease, absence of interstitial lung disease, and anti-transcription intermediary factor 1-gamma or anti-nuclear matrix protein 2, while anti-Mi-2 suggested lower risk. Prognosis was significantly worse in patients with cancer. Cancer-associated dermatomyositis is a distinct subtype, supporting early and repeated cancer screening and the need for standardized surveillance protocols.

items.titleZh: 癌症相关性皮肌炎：文献范围综述
items.abstractZh: 皮肌炎是一种炎症性肌肉疾病，具有特征性皮肤改变，并与癌症密切相关，但这种关联背后的机制和恶性肿瘤的预测因素仍不清楚。为总结当前关于皮肌炎与癌症关系的证据，包括流行病学、临床和血清学预测因素、组织病理学及预后。根据PRISMA-ScR建议，对PubMed、Scopus和Cochrane进行了全面检索。系统筛选符合条件的研究，并图表化及描述性总结相关数据。59项研究符合标准。超过一半的癌症发生在皮肌炎发病后一年内，近90%发生在三年内。泌尿生殖系统、胃肠道和肺癌最为常见。较高风险与年龄较大、男性、吞咽困难、严重皮肤疾病、无间质性肺病以及抗转录中介因子1-γ或抗核基质蛋白2抗体相关，而抗Mi-2抗体提示较低风险。癌症患者的预后显著更差。癌症相关性皮肌炎是一个独特的亚型，支持早期和重复的癌症筛查，并需要标准化的监测方案。

items.title: The landscape of serum autoantibodies in lupus nephritis.
items.abstract: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) and Lupus Nephritis (LN) are prototypes of autoimmune diseases. Mechanisms determining the renal evolution in SLE patients and the identification of predictive biomarkers remain an open issue. We reviwed data on serum levels of potential factors involved in SLE pathogenesis (i.e., NETs and dsDNA degradation) and autoantibodies associated with renal pathology (anti-dsDNA, anti-Histone 2 A and 3, anti-C1q, anti-ENO1, anti-ANXA1, anti-SOD2 IgG2) in patients recruited within the Italian collaborative Zeus study at the onset of renal symptoms (T 0 ) and after 12 months (T 12 ). Clustering analysis based on a few serum parameters allowed the stratification of LN/SLE/controls into well-separated groups. High dsDNA degradation and high anti-ENO1 antibody levels contributed to stratifying SLE and LN, respectively. Anti-ENO1, anti-SOD2, and anti-H2 A/-H3 antibodies paralleled proteinuria levels during the follow up (high at T 0 and normalized after 12 months), whereas anti-dsDNA and anti-C1q IgG2 remained high for the whole observation period. Hazard Risk regression analysis indicated that anti-ENO1 and anti-H2 A IgG2 were associated with proteinuria (>1 g) and renal failure (eGFR <60 mL/min) (HRs and 95% CI highly significant). Anti-ENO1 and anti-Histones 2A serum levels identify LN patients at the onset of renal symptoms and decrease following response to therapies. Both antibodies are associated with proteinuria and renal function loss. Our data support their use as predictive biomarkers for LN follow-up.

items.titleZh: 狼疮肾炎中血清自身抗体的全景
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）和狼疮肾炎（LN）是自身免疫性疾病的原型。决定SLE患者肾脏演变的机制以及预测性生物标志物的识别仍是一个未解决的问题。我们回顾了在意大利合作Zeus研究中，于肾脏症状出现时（T0）和12个月后（T12）招募的患者中，与SLE发病机制相关的潜在因素（即NETs和dsDNA降解）以及与肾脏病理相关的自身抗体（抗dsDNA、抗组蛋白2A和3、抗C1q、抗ENO1、抗ANXA1、抗SOD2 IgG2）的血清水平数据。基于少数血清参数的聚类分析能够将LN/SLE/对照组分层为良好分离的组别。高dsDNA降解和高抗ENO1抗体水平分别有助于SLE和LN的分层。抗ENO1、抗SOD2和抗H2A/-H3抗体在随访期间与蛋白尿水平平行（T0时高，12个月后正常化），而抗dsDNA和抗C1q IgG2在整个观察期间保持高水平。风险回归分析表明，抗ENO1和抗H2A IgG2与蛋白尿（>1g）和肾功能衰竭（eGFR <60 mL/min）相关（HR和95% CI高度显著）。抗ENO1和抗组蛋白2A血清水平在肾脏症状出现时识别LN患者，并在治疗响应后下降。这两种抗体均与蛋白尿和肾功能丧失相关。我们的数据支持它们作为LN随访的预测性生物标志物。

items.title: Altered reproductive hormone profiles in systemic lupus erythematosus - A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) shows a marked female predominance during reproductive years, possibly suggesting hormonal factors in its pathogenesis. However, evidence regarding reproductive hormone alterations in SLE remains inconsistent. To systematically review studies assessing reproductive hormone levels in adult SLE patients compared with healthy controls and across disease activity states. Following PRISMA guidelines and a pre-registered protocol (PROSPERO CRD42024544730), PubMed and Scopus were searched (May 2024). Eligible observational studies reported estradiol, testosterone, progesterone, prolactin, FSH, LH, DHEA-S, DHEA or androstenedione in SLE patients versus controls or by disease activity. Random-effects meta-analyses were conducted. Eighty-three studies were included (5389 individuals for SLE vs. controls; 2067 for active vs. inactive SLE). Prolactin was consistently higher in SLE (MD 8.07 ng/mL; 95% CI 4.69-11.45; p < 0.001) and even more during flare (MD 5.83 ng/mL; 95% CI 3.88-7.78; p < 0.001). Estradiol showed non-significant overall elevations but was significantly higher in women with active disease (MD 8.55 pg/mL; 95% CI 1.37-15.73; p = 0.03). DHEA-S was found to be significantly lower in SLE (MD -1.00 μg/mL; 95% CI -1.5 to -0.50; p = 0.002) but too few studies evaluated its dynamics during flares. FSH and LH were significantly higher in men with SLE. Other hormones were inconsistent. Only three small heterogeneous studies evaluated hormonal changes during flares. Prolactin excess and androgen deficiency are consistent features of SLE, particularly in women, while elevated gonadotropins are mainly seen in men. Estradiol is higher during active disease but other data are inconsistent. Longitudinal studies are limited, with prolactin the only hormone consistently linked to disease activity and full hormonal profiles during flares are largely unstudied.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮中生殖激素谱的改变——系统综述与荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）在育龄期女性中表现出明显的女性优势，可能提示激素因素在其发病机制中的作用。然而，关于SLE中生殖激素改变的证据仍不一致。为系统评估比较成年SLE患者与健康对照者以及不同疾病活动状态下生殖激素水平的研究。遵循PRISMA指南和预先注册的方案（PROSPERO CRD42024544730），检索了PubMed和Scopus（2024年5月）。符合条件的观察性研究报告了SLE患者与对照组或按疾病活动度分组的雌二醇、睾酮、孕酮、催乳素、FSH、LH、DHEA-S、DHEA或雄烯二酮水平。进行了随机效应荟萃分析。共纳入83项研究（SLE与对照组比较5389人；活动性与非活动性SLE比较2067人）。催乳素在SLE中持续升高（MD 8.07 ng/mL；95% CI 4.69-11.45；p < 0.001），在疾病发作期间更高（MD 5.83 ng/mL；95% CI 3.88-7.78；p < 0.001）。雌二醇总体升高不显著，但在活动性疾病女性中显著升高（MD 8.55 pg/mL；95% CI 1.37-15.73；p = 0.03）。DHEA-S在SLE中显著降低（MD -1.00 μg/mL；95% CI -1.5至-0.50；p = 0.002），但评估其在发作期间动态变化的研究太少。男性SLE患者的FSH和LH显著升高。其他激素结果不一致。仅有三项小型异质性研究评估了发作期间的激素变化。催乳素过多和雄激素缺乏是SLE的一致特征，尤其在女性中，而促性腺激素升高主要见于男性。雌二醇在活动性疾病期间较高，但其他数据不一致。纵向研究有限，催乳素是唯一与疾病活动度持续相关的激素，而发作期间完整的激素谱在很大程度上尚未被研究。

items.title: Flatfoot as a key factor for hallux valgus recurrence after Scarf and Akin osteotomies in patients with rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: Joint-preserving procedures such as Scarf osteotomies have been increasingly utilized for hallux valgus (HV) in rheumatoid arthritis (RA). While recurrence remains a concern, its association with foot arch alignment is not well understood. To identify preoperative factors, including foot arch alignment, associated with HV recurrence after Scarf and Akin osteotomies in patients with RA. Retrospective case series. A retrospective analysis was conducted on 49 feet from 41 RA patients who underwent Scarf and Akin osteotomies between 2016 and 2021. Recurrence was defined as an HV angle (HVA) ≥ 20° at 2 years postoperatively, excluding cases with HVA ≥ 20° at 3 months to eliminate early correction failure. Radiographic and clinical parameters were compared between recurrence and non-recurrence groups. After excluding 6 early failure cases, recurrence was observed in 5 feet (11.6%). Significant factors included greater preoperative talonavicular uncoverage percentage (29.7% vs. 20.6%, p = 0.013), higher preoperative Meary's angle (12.3° vs. 3.3°, p = 0.030) and larger first-second intermetatarsal angle (20.0° vs. 15.7°, p = 0.015). Preoperative HVA, calcaneal pitch, or sesamoid position showed no significant difference. Preoperative flatfoot and metatarsal divergence were associated with HV recurrence after Scarf and Akin osteotomies in RA patients. Preoperative assessment of foot arch alignment may help stratify recurrence risk and inform surgical decision-making. Level IV.

items.titleZh: 扁平足作为类风湿关节炎患者Scarf和Akin截骨术后拇外翻复发的关键因素
items.abstractZh: 保留关节的手术如Scarf截骨术越来越多地用于类风湿关节炎（RA）患者的拇外翻（HV）。尽管复发仍是一个问题，但其与足弓对线的关系尚不明确。为确定RA患者Scarf和Akin截骨术后与HV复发相关的术前因素，包括足弓对线。回顾性病例系列。对2016年至2021年间接受Scarf和Akin截骨术的41例RA患者的49只足进行了回顾性分析。复发定义为术后2年HV角（HVA）≥20°，排除术后3个月HVA≥20°的病例以消除早期矫正失败。比较复发组和非复发组的影像学和临床参数。排除6例早期失败后，5只足（11.6%）出现复发。显著因素包括术前更大的距舟关节不覆盖百分比（29.7% vs. 20.6%，p=0.013）、更高的术前Meary角（12.3° vs. 3.3°，p=0.030）和更大的第一二跖骨间角（20.0° vs. 15.7°，p=0.015）。术前HVA、跟骨倾斜角或籽骨位置无显著差异。术前扁平足和跖骨分离与RA患者Scarf和Akin截骨术后HV复发相关。术前评估足弓对线可能有助于分层复发风险并指导手术决策。IV级证据。

items.title: Improving outcomes of patients living with psoriatic arthritis: The Observational Best Practices Research Initiative (OBRI-PsA) registry: Rationale, Methodology and Preliminary Data of 18 Months Follow-up.
items.abstract: Psoriatic arthritis (PsA) is a heterogeneous, chronic inflammatory disease with diverse musculoskeletal and extra-articular manifestations, including enthesitis and dactylitis, which contribute substantially to disease burden, disability, and poor quality of life. Therapeutic advances have mainly focused on polyarticular disease, with limited representation of other PsA domains and real-world complexity. The Observational Best Practices Research Initiative for Psoriatic Arthritis (OBRI-PsA) was established as a national registry to systematically capture diverse PsA phenotypes, assess real-world treatment patterns, and longitudinal clinical outcomes. This report describes the registry methodology and presents preliminary findings from the initial enrolled cohort. OBRI-PsA is actively enrolling patients with active PsA initiating new disease-modifying therapy, irrespective of domain or burden. Baseline and follow-up data are systematically collected to evaluate treatment responses, patient-reported outcomes, productivity, and real-world strategies. Descriptive analyses of 18-month outcomes from the first 101 enrolled patients are presented as a proof-of-concept; the full study protocol is available in the supplementary material. As of September 2024, a total of 101 patients were enrolled (mean age 53.9 ± 12.7 years; 61.4% female). Symmetrical polyarthritis predominated (86.1%), with 91% having skin psoriasis, 49% enthesitis, and 42% dactylitis. At baseline, mean tender and swollen joint counts were 9.8 and 6.5. Over 18 months, patient- and physician-reported outcomes improved, yet only one-third achieved minimal disease activity (MDA). Response rates varied across domains, with the lowest rate observed for enthesitis (24%). Most patients (60-74%) remained on the same therapy at follow-up with no further modifications, despite ongoing disease activity. Patients with fibromyalgia reported higher disease activity, lower quality of life, and fewer treatment responses. Preliminary data from OBRI-PsA highlight persistent unmet needs and variable treatment responses across PsA phenotypes in real-world practice, with relatively few patients achieving treatment targets. These early signals underscore the importance of a comprehensive, longitudinal registry platform to better characterize disease heterogeneity and to inform future phenotype-driven, outcome-focused analyses.

items.titleZh: 改善银屑病关节炎患者预后：观察性最佳实践研究倡议（OBRI-PsA）注册研究：18个月随访的原理、方法和初步数据
items.abstractZh: 银屑病关节炎（PsA）是一种异质性慢性炎症性疾病，具有多种肌肉骨骼和关节外表现，包括附着点炎和指（趾）炎，这些表现显著增加了疾病负担、残疾和不良生活质量。治疗进展主要集中于多关节疾病，而对其他PsA领域和现实世界复杂性的代表性有限。银屑病关节炎观察性最佳实践研究倡议（OBRI-PsA）作为一个国家注册研究建立，旨在系统捕获不同的PsA表型，评估现实世界治疗模式和纵向临床结局。本报告描述了注册研究方法，并介绍了初始入组队列的初步结果。OBRI-PsA正在积极招募开始新疾病修饰治疗的活跃PsA患者，无论其疾病领域或负担如何。系统收集基线和随访数据，以评估治疗反应、患者报告结局、生产力和现实世界策略。对前101名入组患者的18个月结局进行描述性分析，作为概念验证；完整研究方案见补充材料。截至2024年9月，共入组101名患者（平均年龄53.9±12.7岁；61.4%为女性）。对称性多关节炎占主导（86.1%），91%有皮肤银屑病，49%有附着点炎，42%有指（趾）炎。基线时，平均压痛关节数和肿胀关节数分别为9.8和6.5。在18个月内，患者和医生报告结局有所改善，但仅三分之一达到最小疾病活动度（MDA）。各领域的反应率不同，附着点炎的反应率最低（24%）。大多数患者（60-74%）在随访时仍维持相同治疗，未进一步调整，尽管疾病活动持续存在。合并纤维肌痛的患者报告了更高的疾病活动度、更低的生活质量和更少的治疗反应。OBRI-PsA的初步数据突显了现实世界实践中PsA表型持续存在的未满足需求和可变的治疗反应，相对较少的患者达到治疗目标。这些早期信号强调了全面纵向注册研究平台的重要性，以更好地描述疾病异质性，并为未来表型驱动、以结局为导向的分析提供信息。

items.title: National and subnational burden and attributable risk factors of osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and low back pain in Iran: 1990-2019 findings of the Global Burden of Disease (GBD) Study.
items.abstract: The prevalence of chronic diseases has increased concurrent with the increase in life expectancy and musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs) are among them. They have a high burden all over the world and are among the leading causes of years lived with disability (YLDs). MSDs are generally divided into six categories, and osteoarthritis (OA), rheumatoid arthritis (RA), and low back pain (LBP) are among most of the most prevalent MSDs. In this study, we aimed to assess the burden of these three disorders in Iran. Data were retrieved from the global burden of disease (GBD) study 2019 to investigate the epidemiological features of the burden of RA, OA, and LBP and the attributed burden to their risk factors in Iran and its provinces. The total number of OA, RA, and LBP increased from 1990 to 2019. Although the age-standardized incidence rate (ASIR) of LBP decreased by -8.4%, the ASIR of OA and RA increased by 7.3% and 7.6% (reached 445.0 (95% uncertainty interval 395.9 to 501.9) and 5.0 (4.5 to 5.6) per 100,000 population in 2019, respectively). The age-standardized prevalence rate (ASPR) of OA and RA increased by 7.0% and 9.3%, respectively (5588.2 (5041.2 to 6228.6) and 109.1 (97.8 to 120.9) in 2019) while, the ASPR of LBP decreased by 9.5% (8,486.5 (7,533.8 to 9,528.3) in 2019). Females were more prone to establish OA and RA, but males were more predisposed to developing LBP. The highest OA incidence rate was presented in 55-59 years with a decreasing pattern over 59 years, 35-39 years with a decreasing pattern for older patients for RA, and 75-79 years with an increasing LBP incidence observed as age increased. LBP, OA, and RA are still significant health issues, and the number of patients is increasing, which imposes much burden. The increase in the prevalence of MSDs in Iran alarmingly highlights the need for immediate policies designed to reduce their burden. Therefore, epidemiological information helps make policies and reallocate sources that can improve healthcare services.

items.titleZh: 伊朗骨关节炎、类风湿关节炎和腰背痛的国家及地区负担与归因风险因素：1990-2019年全球疾病负担（GBD）研究结果
items.abstractZh: 随着预期寿命的延长，慢性疾病的患病率有所增加，肌肉骨骼疾病（MSDs）是其中之一。它们在全世界范围内具有高负担，并且是导致残疾生活年数（YLDs）的主要原因之一。MSDs通常分为六类，其中骨关节炎（OA）、类风湿关节炎（RA）和腰背痛（LBP）是最常见的MSDs之一。在本研究中，我们旨在评估这三种疾病在伊朗的负担。数据来源于2019年全球疾病负担（GBD）研究，以调查伊朗及其各省份RA、OA和LBP负担的流行病学特征及其归因于风险因素的负担。从1990年到2019年，OA、RA和LBP的总病例数有所增加。尽管LBP的年龄标准化发病率（ASIR）下降了-8.4%，但OA和RA的ASIR分别增加了7.3%和7.6%（2019年分别达到每100,000人口445.0（95%不确定性区间395.9至501.9）和5.0（4.5至5.6））。OA和RA的年龄标准化患病率（ASPR）分别增加了7.0%和9.3%（2019年分别为5588.2（5041.2至6228.6）和109.1（97.8至120.9）），而LBP的ASPR下降了9.5%（2019年为8,486.5（7,533.8至9,528.3））。女性更容易患OA和RA，但男性更容易患LBP。OA的最高发病率出现在55-59岁，之后随年龄增长呈下降趋势；RA的最高发病率出现在35-39岁，之后随年龄增长呈下降趋势；LBP的发病率随年龄增长而增加，在75-79岁达到最高。LBP、OA和RA仍然是重要的健康问题，患者数量不断增加，带来了巨大负担。伊朗MSDs患病率的增加警示需要立即制定政策以减轻其负担。因此，流行病学信息有助于制定政策和重新分配资源，从而改善医疗服务。

items.title: Long-term Safety and Efficacy of Anifrolumab in Systemic Lupus Erythematosus: A Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials, Extension Studies, and Real-World Cohorts.
items.abstract: Anifrolumab, a type I interferon receptor antagonist, has shown effectiveness in treating moderate-to-severe systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE). To fully understand its long-term efficacy, glucocorticoid (GC)-sparing potential, and cumulative safety profile in everyday clinical practice, it is essential to combine up to 4 years of long-term extension (LTE) trial data with emerging real-world evidence (RWE). A systematic literature search was performed across major electronic databases to identify phase 2/3 randomized controlled trials (RCTs), long-term extension (LTE) studies, and RWE cohorts assessing anifrolumab in SLE. Comparative odds ratios (ORs) for RCTs were calculated using the Mantel-Haenszel method, while pooled proportions for single-arm RWE cohorts were estimated using a random-effects model. Primary outcomes included BICLA response, Lupus Low Disease Activity State (LLDAS), GC reduction (to ≤ 7.5 mg/day), and Herpes Zoster (HZ) incidence. Ten studies were included, comprising phase 2/3 RCTs, their LTEs (TULIP-LTE, MUSE-LTE), and four European RWE cohorts. In the RCTs (N = 1,093), anifrolumab significantly improved BICLA responses compared to placebo (pooled OR 1.85, 95% CI 1.42-2.41, p < 0.001) and enhanced the likelihood of achieving a target GC dose of ≤ 7.5 mg/day (OR 2.24, 95% CI 1.52-3.29, p < 0.001). In the pooled RWE cohorts (N = 294), the estimated attainment rate for LLDAS at 6-12 months was notably high at 75.8% (95% CI 68.4-82.5%). Additionally, 72.5% of real-world patients achieved a >50% reduction in GC dosage. Regarding safety, there was no significant increase in overall serious adverse events (SAEs) (OR 0.82, p = 0.25). Although anifrolumab was linked to a higher risk of HZ (OR 3.45, 95% CI 1.95-6.10, p < 0.001), both LTE and RWE data indicated that these cases were mainly mild to moderate and manageable. Anifrolumab offers rapid, strong, and sustained disease control while providing significant GC-sparing effects in both tightly controlled clinical trials and diverse real-world populations. The long-term safety profile remains stable; however, preventative measures, such as HZ vaccination, should be implemented as part of standard care.

items.title: Assessment of skin stiffness in systemic sclerosis using optical coherence elastography: A comparative study with histology and clinical parameters.
items.abstract: Systemic sclerosis (SSc), or scleroderma, is an autoimmune disorder marked by increased mortality due to excessive collagen accumulation in the body. The modified Rodnan Skin Score (mRSS) is the standard for assessing dermal thickening in SSc but shows high observer variability. Optical coherence elastography (OCE) is a promising alternative for evaluating skin involvement in SSc, though comprehensive comparative studies with histological and clinical assessment are lacking. We evaluated OCE's face (SSc versus healthy skin), construct (correlation to mRSS), and criterion (correlation with histology) validities in 20 control and 55 SSc patients, with assessments on the finger, hand, and forearm. Assessors were blinded to results in the other domains, and OCE was performed completely contact free at ∼500 Hz, 1 kHz, 5 kHz, and 10 kHz stimulation. There was a significant difference in OCE measurements between control and SSc skin at all examined locations (face validity). However, there was a weak to moderate correlation between OCE and mRSS at certain frequencies (construct validity). Additionally, OCE exhibited weak to moderate correlations with histological parameters. Although OCE demonstrated strong face validity, its construct and criterion validity were moderate at best, highlighting the need for further development. This research is the most exhaustive comparison of OCE against clinical and histological markers of skin involvement in SSc. The results strongly support OCE's face validity, but the weak to moderate construct and criterion validity underline the need for further development. Nevertheless, these results show critical progress towards developing an objective skin assessment tool for SSc.

items.titleZh: 使用光学相干弹性成像评估系统性硬化症中的皮肤硬度：与组织学和临床参数的比较研究
items.abstractZh: 系统性硬化症（SSc），或称硬皮病，是一种自身免疫性疾病，因体内过量胶原蛋白沉积导致死亡率增加。改良Rodnan皮肤评分（mRSS）是评估SSc皮肤增厚的标准方法，但观察者间变异性高。光学相干弹性成像（OCE）是评估SSc皮肤受累的一种有前景的替代方法，但目前缺乏与组织学和临床评估的全面比较研究。我们在20名对照者和55名SSc患者中评估了OCE的表面效度（SSc与健康皮肤对比）、结构效度（与mRSS的相关性）和标准效度（与组织学的相关性），评估部位包括手指、手背和前臂。评估者对其它领域的结果不知情，OCE在约500 Hz、1 kHz、5 kHz和10 kHz刺激下完全无接触进行。在所有检查部位，对照皮肤与SSc皮肤的OCE测量值存在显著差异（表面效度）。然而，在某些频率下，OCE与mRSS之间呈弱至中度相关性（结构效度）。此外，OCE与组织学参数之间也呈弱至中度相关性。尽管OCE表现出较强的表面效度，但其结构效度和标准效度最多为中等，凸显了进一步发展的必要性。本研究是OCE与SSc皮肤受累的临床和组织学标志物最全面的比较。结果强烈支持OCE的表面效度，但弱至中度的结构效度和标准效度强调了进一步发展的需求。尽管如此，这些结果显示了在开发SSc客观皮肤评估工具方面取得了关键进展。

items.title: Association between Modified Cardiometabolic Index and rheumatoid arthritis: the mediating role of phenotypic age acceleration.
items.abstract: Modified Cardiometabolic Index (MCMI) is a novel metabolic assessment metric integrating waist-to-height ratio (WHtR), lipid, and fasting plasma glucose (FPG). Rheumatoid arthritis (RA), as an autoimmune disease, is closely linked to metabolic status, yet the relation of MCMI to RA remains unclear. Phenotypic age acceleration (PAA), reflecting biological aging, possibly mediates the relation of MCMI to RA. Our study aimed to elucidate the relation of MCMI to RA and assess the mediating effect of PAA. 1999-2010 and 2015-2020 National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES) data on 10,564 adults were analyzed. RA status was determined via questionnaire. MCMI was calculated based on WHtR, triglycerides (TG), high-density lipoprotein cholesterol (HDL-C), and FPG. PAA was derived as the residual of phenotypic age (PA) regressed on chronological age. The association of MCMI with RA was examined via weighted logistic regression (WLR), restricted cubic splines (RCS) assessed potential nonlinearity, and mediation analysis examined the effect of PAA. In multivariable-adjusted models, every one-unit rise in MCMI was related to a 45.1% higher RA prevalence (OR = 1.451, 95% CI: 1.250-1.685). MCMI was split into tertiles. The highest tertile (T3) displayed a significantly higher RA prevalence than the lowest tertile (T1) (OR = 1.879, 95% CI: 1.379-2.559). RCS analysis indicated a linear relation of MCMI to RA (P for nonlinear = 0.331). PAA accounted for 17.446% of the relation of MCMI to RA in mediation analysis (P < 0.001). MCMI is positively associated with RA risk, with PAA partially mediating this relationship. These findings suggest that metabolic dysregulation may influence RA development through accelerated biological aging, providing a novel perspective for early prevention and metabolic interventions in RA. Key Points • These findings suggest that poorer metabolic health may be associated with RA, partly through accelerated biological aging. • In practice, metabolic assessment may help identify people at higher risk of RA and support earlier lifestyle or clinical interventions. • The results also highlight biological aging as a possible pathway linking metabolism and RA.

items.titleZh: 改良心脏代谢指数与类风湿关节炎的关联：表型年龄加速的中介作用
items.abstractZh: 改良心脏代谢指数（MCMI）是一种整合腰围身高比（WHtR）、血脂和空腹血糖（FPG）的新型代谢评估指标。类风湿关节炎（RA）作为一种自身免疫性疾病，与代谢状态密切相关，但MCMI与RA的关系尚不清楚。表型年龄加速（PAA）反映生物衰老，可能介导MCMI与RA的关系。本研究旨在阐明MCMI与RA的关系，并评估PAA的中介效应。分析了1999-2010年和2015-2020年国家健康与营养调查（NHANES）中10,564名成人的数据。RA状态通过问卷确定。MCMI基于WHtR、甘油三酯（TG）、高密度脂蛋白胆固醇（HDL-C）和FPG计算。PAA定义为表型年龄（PA）对实际年龄回归的残差。通过加权逻辑回归（WLR）检验MCMI与RA的关联，限制性立方样条（RCS）评估潜在非线性，中介分析检验PAA的效应。在多变量调整模型中，MCMI每增加一个单位，RA患病率增加45.1%（OR = 1.451, 95% CI: 1.250-1.685）。MCMI分为三分位数。最高三分位数（T3）的RA患病率显著高于最低三分位数（T1）（OR = 1.879, 95% CI: 1.379-2.559）。RCS分析显示MCMI与RA呈线性关系（非线性P = 0.331）。在中介分析中，PAA解释了MCMI与RA关系的17.446%（P < 0.001）。MCMI与RA风险正相关，PAA部分介导了这一关系。这些发现表明代谢失调可能通过加速生物衰老影响RA的发生，为RA的早期预防和代谢干预提供了新视角。关键点 • 这些发现表明较差的代谢健康可能与RA相关，部分通过加速生物衰老实现。 • 在实践中，代谢评估可能有助于识别RA高风险人群，并支持更早期的生活方式或临床干预。 • 结果还强调生物衰老是连接代谢与RA的可能途径。

items.title: Human epididymis protein 4: a potential prognostic biomarker for rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease.
items.abstract: This study aimed to assess the impact of human epididymis protein 4 (HE4) on the progression and mortality of interstitial lung disease (ILD) in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) patients. A retrospective 5-year follow-up study was conducted on RA-ILD patients. Serum HE4 levels were measured using electrochemiluminescence immunoassay to investigate their associations with clinical parameters and prognosis. A total of 136 consecutive RA-ILD patients were enrolled. The 5-year survival rate was 91.91%. Patients with ILD progression exhibited higher baseline serum HE4 levels than those without progression (152.44 pmol/L vs. 88.95 pmol/L, P < 0.001). During follow-up, serum HE4 levels progressively increased with disease progression in patients with RA-ILD. Patients who died had higher baseline serum HE4 levels than survivors (229.00 pmol/L vs. 111.80 pmol/L, P < 0.001). Baseline serum HE4 levels were significantly negatively correlated with pulmonary function parameters and positively correlated with inflammatory indicators. ROC analysis showed models incorporating HE4 presented better predictive efficacy for progression and mortality than the conventional model. Multivariate regression further validated that elevated serum HE4 levels (≥ 110.30 pmol/L) served as an independent risk factor for ILD progression (odds ratio [OR] = 10.083, 95% confidence interval [CI]: 2.660-38.224, P = 0.001). Kaplan-Meier analysis, as an exploratory analysis, showed that high serum HE4 levels (≥ 131.95 pmol/L) were correlated with elevated mortality risk (hazard ratio (HR) = 7.822, 95% CI: 2.347-26.070, P < 0.001). Notably, multivariable Cox regression failed to confirm its independent prognostic value for mortality. Serum HE4 shows promise as a potential prognostic biomarker for RA-ILD, particularly for evaluating the risk of ILD progression. Given the limitations of this retrospective single-center study and lack of external validation, its value for predicting mortality remains to be further verified in larger cohorts. Key Points • RA-ILD patients with disease progression or mortality had significantly higher baseline serum HE4 levels. • Baseline serum HE4 levels strongly correlated with lung disease severity in RA-ILD. • Serum HE4 levels increased progressively with disease progression in RA-ILD. • Elevated HE4 levels were linked to poor RA-ILD outcomes, but not an independent predictor of mortality.

items.titleZh: 人附睾蛋白4：类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病的潜在预后生物标志物
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在评估人附睾蛋白4（HE4）对类风湿关节炎（RA）患者间质性肺病（ILD）进展和死亡率的影响。对RA-ILD患者进行了一项回顾性5年随访研究。采用电化学发光免疫法测定血清HE4水平，探讨其与临床参数和预后的关联。共纳入136例连续的RA-ILD患者。5年生存率为91.91%。ILD进展患者的基线血清HE4水平高于无进展患者（152.44 pmol/L vs. 88.95 pmol/L，P < 0.001）。随访期间，RA-ILD患者血清HE4水平随疾病进展逐渐升高。死亡患者的基线血清HE4水平高于存活者（229.00 pmol/L vs. 111.80 pmol/L，P < 0.001）。基线血清HE4水平与肺功能参数显著负相关，与炎症指标正相关。ROC分析显示，纳入HE4的模型对进展和死亡率的预测效能优于传统模型。多变量回归进一步验证，血清HE4水平升高（≥ 110.30 pmol/L）是ILD进展的独立危险因素（比值比[OR] = 10.083，95%置信区间[CI]：2.660-38.224，P = 0.001）。作为探索性分析，Kaplan-Meier分析显示，高血清HE4水平（≥ 131.95 pmol/L）与死亡风险升高相关（风险比(HR) = 7.822，95% CI：2.347-26.070，P < 0.001）。值得注意的是，多变量Cox回归未能证实其对死亡率的独立预后价值。血清HE4有望成为RA-ILD的潜在预后生物标志物，尤其适用于评估ILD进展风险。鉴于本回顾性单中心研究的局限性及缺乏外部验证，其对死亡率的预测价值有待在更大队列中进一步验证。关键点 • 疾病进展或死亡的RA-ILD患者基线血清HE4水平显著升高。 • 基线血清HE4水平与RA-ILD肺部疾病严重程度密切相关。 • RA-ILD患者血清HE4水平随疾病进展逐渐升高。 • HE4水平升高与RA-ILD不良结局相关，但并非死亡率的独立预测因子。

items.title: Adult-Onset LRBA Deficiency Presenting with Rheumatoid Arthritis-Like Manifestations: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Lipopolysaccharide-responsive beige-like anchor protein (LRBA) deficiency is a primary inborn error of immunity characterized by immune dysregulation and frequently associated with autoimmune connective tissue manifestations. We describe an adult woman diagnosed with rheumatoid arthritis who was subsequently found to have LRBA deficiency based on genetic testing and investigated inflammatory proteins potentially involved in the pathogenesis of LRBA deficiency. A 44-year-old woman with rheumatoid arthritis presented with persistent diarrhea and abdominal distention lasting over eight months. Abdominal imaging revealed intestinal pseudo-obstruction. Her medical history included megaloblastic anemia, type 1 diabetes, and chronic thyroiditis since childhood. Her brother had died of unexplained diarrhea during childhood. Given her multiple autoimmune manifestations and family history, a primary immune deficiency (PID) was suspected. Genetic analysis identified a heterozygous LRBA splice-site variant (c.1162-1G > A) and a possible heterozygous deletion involving exons 18-41, suggesting compound heterozygous LRBA variants. Thus, the diagnosis of LRBA deficiency-associated autoimmunity. Following the diagnosis, she was treated with abatacept, a CTLA4-immunoglobulin fusion protein, resulting in improvement of gastrointestinal symptoms. Proximity extension assay (Olink ® Target) revealed marked decreases in serum interleukin-17 A (from 3.36 to 2.22 normalized protein expression), tumor necrosis factor (3.26 to 0.69), and chemokine (C-C motif) ligand 20 (3.14 to 0.84) after treatment. LRBA deficiency is characterized by an imbalance of CD4⁺ T cells with increased Th1 and Th17 populations and reduced regulatory T cells. This case highlights that patients with PID, including LRBA deficiency, can present with autoimmune manifestations, and abatacept may represent an effective targeted treatment option for LRBA-deficiency.

items.title: Axial gout diagnosed by dual-energy CT in a young normouricaemic man with recurrent nephrolithiasis: a case-based review.
items.abstract: Axial gout is an underrecognized manifestation of monosodium urate (MSU) crystal deposition and frequently mimics inflammatory, infectious, or mechanical spinal disorders, particularly without overt hyperuricaemia. We report a 29-year-old man with recurrent low back pain for over two years and recurrent nephrolithiasis who had undergone three extracorporeal shock wave lithotripsy sessions with only transient relief. Admission laboratory investigations showed normal serum urate (262 µmol/L, ~ 4.4 mg/dL) but markedly elevated C‑reactive protein (119 mg/L) and erythrocyte sedimentation rate (53 mm/h). Retrospective review of prior hospitalizations for ureteral stones revealed that routine serum urate measurements had never been elevated. Conventional imaging, including plain radiography and non‑contrast computed tomography, was inconclusive. Dual‑energy computed tomography (DECT) revealed MSU deposition in the L4/L5 and L5/S1 facet joints and sacral foramina, supporting the diagnosis of axial gout. The patient was treated with etoricoxib (60 mg daily) and febuxostat (20 mg daily). On telephone follow‑up on 27 May 2026 (the only follow‑up to date), he reported that the J stent had been removed and low back pain had completely resolved without recurrence. A single repeat laboratory test performed locally was reported as normal, though specific values were unavailable. A systematic literature review of 58 eligible articles revealed that the lumbar spine was most frequently involved (≈ 60%), DECT sensitivity ranged from 78% to 100%, and 77.5% of historically reported cases required surgical diagnosis, underscoring the underrecognition of axial gout in non-surgical settings. This case‑based review highlights that axial gout should be considered in young non‑hyperuricaemic patients with persistent axial pain, and that DECT is a valuable non‑invasive diagnostic tool when interpreted alongside clinical and laboratory features.

items.titleZh: 双能CT诊断的年轻正常尿酸血症复发性肾结石患者轴性痛风：基于病例的综述
items.abstractZh: 轴性痛风是单钠尿酸盐（MSU）晶体沉积的一种未被充分认识的表现，常类似炎症性、感染性或机械性脊柱疾病，尤其是在无明显高尿酸血症的情况下。我们报告一名29岁男性，有超过两年的复发性腰痛和复发性肾结石病史，曾接受三次体外冲击波碎石术，仅获得短暂缓解。入院实验室检查显示血清尿酸正常（262 µmol/L，约4.4 mg/dL），但C反应蛋白（119 mg/L）和红细胞沉降率（53 mm/h）显著升高。回顾既往因输尿管结石住院的记录，常规血清尿酸测量从未升高。传统影像学检查，包括平片和非增强计算机断层扫描，均无定论。双能计算机断层扫描（DECT）显示L4/L5和L5/S1小关节及骶孔有MSU沉积，支持轴性痛风的诊断。患者接受依托考昔（60 mg每日）和非布司他（20 mg每日）治疗。在2026年5月27日的电话随访（迄今为止唯一一次随访）中，患者报告J型支架已拔除，腰痛完全缓解且未复发。当地进行的一次重复实验室检查报告正常，但具体数值不详。对58篇合格文章的系统文献综述显示，腰椎最常受累（约60%），DECT敏感性范围为78%至100%，且77.5%的历史报告病例需要手术诊断，这突显了轴性痛风在非手术环境中的未被充分认识。本病例综述强调，对于持续轴性疼痛的年轻非高尿酸血症患者，应考虑轴性痛风，并且DECT是一种有价值的非侵入性诊断工具，需结合临床和实验室特征进行解读。

items.title: Psoriatic arthritis patients have increased morbidity already at the time of diagnosis: a case-control study.
items.abstract: To evaluate the prevalence of comorbidities preceding the diagnosis of psoriatic arthritis (PsA) compared with the general population. We identified all adult patients granted a special reimbursement (SR) for disease-modifying anti-rheumatic drugs for PsA between 2002 and 2014 from the Finnish Social Insurance Institution register (N = 6077). Three general population controls were matched to each case. Visits to specialized medical care (Classification of Disease 10th revision coded), and prescription drug purchases categorized by Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical codes were collected for cases and controls between 2000 and 2014. We evaluated the period from 24 months before to 3 months after the index date (ID), defined as the date when the SR was granted. SRs granted for other chronic diseases prior to the ID were additionally collected. PsA patients had three times more visits to specialized medical care and increased overall drug use compared with controls. Based on SRs valid at the time of PsA diagnosis, new-onset PsA patients had significantly higher prevalence of diabetes mellitus (women: 11% vs. 7%; men: 14% vs. 10%; all p < 0.001), cardiovascular diseases (women: 19% vs. 14%; men: 23% vs. 18%; all p < 0.001), and obstructive lung diseases (women: 12% vs. 7%; men: 8% vs. 6%; all p < 0.001) compared with controls. PsA patients demonstrate increased morbidity already at the time of PsA diagnosis. Screening for comorbidities should therefore be considered when joint disease is clinically apparent.

items.titleZh: 银屑病关节炎患者在诊断时已存在更高的合并症负担：一项病例对照研究
items.abstractZh: 评估与普通人群相比，银屑病关节炎（PsA）诊断前合并症的患病率。我们从芬兰社会保险机构登记处识别了2002年至2014年间因PsA获得疾病改善抗风湿药物特殊报销（SR）的所有成年患者（N = 6077）。为每例患者匹配三个普通人群对照。收集2000年至2014年间病例和对照的专科医疗就诊（国际疾病分类第10版编码）和按解剖治疗化学分类编码的处方药购买情况。我们评估了从索引日期（ID，即SR获批日期）前24个月至后3个月的时期。此外，还收集了ID前因其他慢性疾病获得的SR。与对照组相比，PsA患者的专科医疗就诊次数高出三倍，总体药物使用增加。基于PsA诊断时有效的SR，新发PsA患者与对照组相比，糖尿病（女性：11% vs. 7%；男性：14% vs. 10%；所有p < 0.001）、心血管疾病（女性：19% vs. 14%；男性：23% vs. 18%；所有p < 0.001）和阻塞性肺病（女性：12% vs. 7%；男性：8% vs. 6%；所有p < 0.001）的患病率显著更高。PsA患者在诊断时已表现出更高的合并症负担。因此，当关节疾病临床明显时，应考虑进行合并症筛查。

items.title: Anesthetic management of a high-risk cesarean delivery in a patient with multivessel Takayasu arteritis.
items.abstract: Takayasu arteritis (TA) is a rare chronic inflammatory disease affecting large vessels that can result in stenosis, occlusion, and aneurysm formation. Although not a contraindication, TA poses significant anesthetic challenges in pregnancy. We describe the successful anesthetic management of a patient with TA complicated by aortic root dilation, abdominal aortic aneurysm, bilateral subclavian artery, and bilateral carotid artery stenosis undergoing elective cesarean delivery at 37 weeks. To minimize hemodynamic fluctuations, we used a slowly titrated dural puncture epidural technique along with standard American Society of Anesthesiologists monitors and invasive monitoring with a dorsalis pedis arterial line. The procedure was completed without perioperative maternal complications, resulting in the delivery of a healthy neonate. This case emphasizes the anesthetic challenges of managing the complex pathophysiology of Takayasu arteritis and the associated cardiovascular hemodynamics in the peripartum period. Close hemodynamic monitoring during cesarean delivery is crucial to minimize the risks of aortic rupture or dissection and cerebral ischemia.A dural puncture epidural technique can be considered to achieve hemodynamic goals of avoiding aortic wall stress and maintaining cerebral perfusion.Due to rapid fluid shifts postpartum, patients are at highest risk for dissection and hemodynamic decompensation. Therefore, transfer to the cardiac intensive care unit for immediate postpartum monitoring and recovery is critical.

items.titleZh: 多血管大动脉炎患者高危剖宫产术的麻醉管理
items.abstractZh: 大动脉炎（TA）是一种罕见的慢性炎症性疾病，累及大血管，可导致狭窄、闭塞和动脉瘤形成。虽然并非禁忌症，但TA在妊娠期带来显著的麻醉挑战。我们描述了一例TA患者成功进行麻醉管理的病例，该患者合并主动脉根部扩张、腹主动脉瘤、双侧锁骨下动脉和双侧颈动脉狭窄，于孕37周接受择期剖宫产。为尽量减少血流动力学波动，我们采用了缓慢滴定的硬膜穿破硬膜外技术，并结合标准美国麻醉医师协会监测以及通过足背动脉置管进行有创监测。手术顺利完成，无围产期母体并发症，分娩出一名健康新生儿。本病例强调了管理大动脉炎复杂病理生理及围产期相关心血管血流动力学的麻醉挑战。剖宫产期间严密的血流动力学监测对于最大程度降低主动脉破裂或夹层及脑缺血的风险至关重要。硬膜穿破硬膜外技术可考虑用于实现避免主动脉壁应力和维持脑灌注的血流动力学目标。由于产后快速液体转移，患者发生夹层和血流动力学失代偿的风险最高。因此，转入心脏重症监护室进行产后即刻监测和恢复至关重要。

items.title: Understanding the burden of orofacial involvement and patient treatment preferences in systemic sclerosis: results from a large international survey.
items.abstract: Orofacial manifestations are significantly impactful in patients with systemic sclerosis (SSc), yet remain understudied, with no dedicated clinical guidelines to inform their management. An international online survey comprising 38 questions addressing orofacial manifestations of SSc, including patients' confidence in their treating teams, and perceived unmet needs. Descriptive statistics were used to summarize the data. We included responses from 334 individuals with SSc, who were predominantly female (95%), older than 55 years (>90%), of white race (87%), and residing in North America (68%) or Europe (23.7%). Most participants were registered with a dentist (90%), and attended at least biannually (64%); however, while (71%) brushing at least twice daily, only 49% used interdental aids daily. Difficulties with oral hygeiene were mainly due to restricted mouth opening (76.7%) and reduced dexterity (65%). The most frequently reported orofacial manifestations were xerostomia (81%), facial appearance concerns (76%), restricted mouth opening (75%), dysphagia (71.3%), and denture-related problems (70% of denture users). Following SSc diagnosis, increased dental extractions (12.6%) and worsening periodontal health (16.3%) were reported. Patients expressed more confidence in their rheumatologists (69.7%) than their dentists (46.1%) in raising concerns regarding the management of SSc-related orofacial issues. Over half of the respondants (55.7%) felt their oral health needs were neglected, particularly regarding periodontal health (51%), enamel wear (35%) and dental caries (28%). Orofacial issues are common and impactful yet frequently overlooked by clinicians involved in SSc patient care and management. We have identified important patient-focussed priorities to inform the future research agenda.

items.titleZh: 理解系统性硬化症中口面部受累的负担和患者治疗偏好：一项大型国际调查的结果
items.abstractZh: 口面部表现在系统性硬化症（SSc）患者中具有显著影响，但研究不足，且缺乏专门的临床指南来指导其管理。一项国际在线调查包含38个问题，涉及SSc的口面部表现，包括患者对其治疗团队的信心以及感知到的未满足需求。使用描述性统计总结数据。我们纳入了334名SSc患者的回复，其中主要为女性（95%）、年龄超过55岁（>90%）、白人（87%），居住在北美洲（68%）或欧洲（23.7%）。大多数参与者已在牙医处登记（90%），并至少每半年就诊一次（64%）；然而，虽然71%的人每天至少刷牙两次，但只有49%的人每天使用牙间辅助工具。口腔卫生困难主要是由于张口受限（76.7%）和灵活性下降（65%）。最常报告的口面部表现是口干症（81%）、面部外观担忧（76%）、张口受限（75%）、吞咽困难（71.3%）以及假牙相关问题（70%的假牙使用者）。在SSc诊断后，报告了牙齿拔除增加（12.6%）和牙周健康恶化（16.3%）。患者对风湿病医生（69.7%）比牙医（46.1%）更有信心提出关于SSc相关口面部问题管理的担忧。超过一半的受访者（55.7%）认为他们的口腔健康需求被忽视，特别是在牙周健康（51%）、牙釉质磨损（35%）和龋齿（28%）方面。口面部问题常见且影响重大，但经常被参与SSc患者护理和管理的临床医生忽视。我们确定了以患者为中心的重要优先事项，以指导未来的研究议程。

items.title: From Adult to Adolescent: Alignment in Clinical Trials and Outcomes in Axial Spondyloarthritis.
items.abstract: Spondyloarthritis (SpA) is a group of chronic inflammatory diseases encompassing axial and peripheral forms, with up to 20% of patients developing symptoms before age 16. Despite this substantial pediatric burden, treatment options for juvenile-onset SpA (JSpA), particularly those with axial disease (axJSpA), remain limited. This gap underscores the need for evidence-based approaches to extend effective therapies to children. This review highlights the strong parallels between adult axial SpA (axSpA) and axJSpA, supporting the appropriateness of extrapolating efficacy and target drug exposure data from adults to children. Adult- and juvenile-onset axSpA (axJSpA) share key clinical and pathogenic features, including overlapping clinical symptoms, genetic susceptibility, and treatment approaches. Classification systems also align: adult axial SpA is classified according to the Assessment of Spondyloarthritis International Society (ASAS) criteria, while children are classified using the recently validated axJSpA criteria, which closely mirrors the adult framework. Treatment paradigms further reinforce these similarities. Non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs) and tumor necrosis factor inhibitors (TNFi) are standard therapy in both adults and children, and emerging mechanisms, such as inhibition of IL-17A/F and JAK, are relevant across age groups. However, the absence of approved agents for axJSpA underscores the importance of leveraging data from adults. Given the shared biology, clinical phenotype, treatment response patterns, and the availability of shared outcome measures such as the Spondyloarthritis Research Consortium of Canada (SPARCC) MRI inflammation and structural scores, extrapolating efficacy and target drug exposure data from adults with axSpA to children with axJSpA is scientifically justified and critical for addressing the unmet therapeutic needs in affected youth.

items.titleZh: 从成人到青少年：中轴型脊柱关节炎临床试验与结局的一致性
items.abstractZh: 脊柱关节炎（SpA）是一组慢性炎症性疾病，包括中轴型和外周型，其中高达20%的患者在16岁前出现症状。尽管存在这一显著的儿童疾病负担，但幼年发病型SpA（JSpA），特别是伴有中轴病变者（axJSpA）的治疗选择仍然有限。这一差距凸显了需要基于证据的方法将有效疗法扩展至儿童。本综述强调了成人中轴型SpA（axSpA）与axJSpA之间的高度相似性，支持将成人的疗效和靶点药物暴露数据外推至儿童的合理性。成人和幼年发病型axSpA（axJSpA）具有共同的临床和致病特征，包括重叠的临床症状、遗传易感性和治疗方法。分类系统也保持一致：成人中轴型SpA根据国际脊柱关节炎评估协会（ASAS）标准进行分类，而儿童则使用最近验证的axJSpA标准进行分类，该标准与成人框架高度相似。治疗模式进一步强化了这些相似性。非甾体抗炎药（NSAIDs）和肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂（TNFi）是成人和儿童的标准疗法，而新兴机制如IL-17A/F和JAK抑制在不同年龄组中均具有相关性。然而，axJSpA缺乏获批药物凸显了利用成人数据的重要性。鉴于共同的生物学、临床表型、治疗反应模式以及共享结局指标（如加拿大脊柱关节炎研究联盟（SPARCC）MRI炎症和结构评分）的可用性，将成人axSpA的疗效和靶点药物暴露数据外推至儿童axJSpA在科学上是合理的，并且对于解决受影响青少年未满足的治疗需求至关重要。

items.title: Deep Immunophenotyping Reveals Distinct Immune Signatures in Axial Spondyloarthritis and Psoriatic Arthritis.
items.abstract: Axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) and psoriatic arthritis (PsA) are overlapping yet distinct conditions within the spondyloarthritis (SpA) spectrum. As divergent immunophenotypes may influence disease course and therapeutic response, we compared immune cell subsets, cytokine profiles, and inflammatory mediators. Peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) from 179 patients (88 axSpA, 91 PsA) and 49 healthy donors were profiled using spectral flow cytometry, comprising 230 million acquired events and 55 million quality-controlled cells. Immune subsets, activation- and differentiation-associated markers and cytokines were analyzed to define disease-specific profiles. AxSpA and PsA exhibited distinct immunophenotypic profiles. AxSpA was characterized by expansion of double-negative and γδ T cells, increased plasmablasts and CD21low B cells, and higher expression of activation-associated markers (CD80, CD86, CD95), consistent with dysregulated innate-like immune activation. PsA showed increased dendritic cells and a higher frequency of IgM + IgD - memory B cells. Both diseases exhibited Th1 enrichment; however, axSpA showed additional Th17 skewing and increased expression of activation- and checkpoint-associated markers (HLA-DR, CD38, PD-1), whereas PsA displayed more central memory CD4 + T cells and lower PD-1 expression. Cytokine profiling revealed elevated inflammasome-related and innate cytokines in axSpA, while PsA showed increased sIL2R, IL-17A, sTNFR1, and vascular-associated inflammatory mediators. Regularized regression identified a stable immune signature distinguishing axSpA from PsA (cross-validated AUC 0.94). AxSpA and PsA share overlapping yet distinguishable immunophenotypic signatures. AxSpA shows enrichment of innate-associated and broadly activated immune features, whereas PsA is characterized by adaptive and memory-associated immune responses. These findings may support biomarker-guided stratification within the SpA spectrum.

items.title: Restricted cubic spline analysis of treatment duration before tocilizumab withdrawal and relapse risk in rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: Tocilizumab (TCZ), an interleukin-6 receptor inhibitor, is effective for moderate to severe rheumatoid arthritis (RA). However, maintaining remission after TCZ withdrawal remains challenging, and the treatment duration required before discontinuation to minimize relapse risk is unclear. To identify a TCZ treatment-duration threshold before withdrawal that is associated with a lower risk of relapse in patients with RA. This was a retrospective study including 97 patients with RA who discontinued intravenous TCZ after stable disease control. We retrospectively analyzed 97 RA patients who achieved remission or low disease activity prior to TCZ withdrawal. The primary outcome was relapse within 12 months post-discontinuation. Cox proportional hazards regression identified independent predictors, while restricted cubic spline (RCS) modeling assessed non-linear associations between treatment duration and relapse risk. A simplified risk stratification tool was developed and internally validated using bootstrap resampling. Among 97 patients with RA who discontinued TCZ after stable disease control, most were biologic-naïve (98.9%), the mean disease duration was 72.9 ± 52.7 months, and concomitant methotrexate and hydroxychloroquine were used in 73.2% and 47.4% of patients, respectively. During the 12-month follow-up, 54 patients (55.7%) relapsed. TCZ treatment duration was an independent protective factor (adjusted HR = 0.892 per month, p  = 0.002), whereas anti-citrullinated protein antibody (ACPA) positivity was associated with increased relapse risk (adjusted HR = 2.122, p  = 0.031). RCS analysis demonstrated an L-shaped non-linear relationship, identifying an empirically derived duration threshold at approximately 200 days associated with lower relapse risk. A simplified score assigning 1 point each for ACPA positivity and TCZ duration < 200 days stratified patients into low- (0 points), intermediate- (1 point), and high-risk (2 points) groups, with relapse rates of 27.3%, 53.8%, and 91.7%, respectively; the model showed acceptable discrimination (AUC = 0.76). Longer TCZ treatment duration and ACPA negativity were associated with a lower risk of relapse after TCZ withdrawal. An approximately 200-day treatment duration may serve as a clinically informative threshold for risk-stratified withdrawal decisions in routine practice, although disease control after withdrawal should be interpreted in the context of ongoing background therapy rather than confirmed drug-free remission. How long should tocilizumab be used before stopping in rheumatoid arthritis? Rheumatoid arthritis is a long-term condition in which the immune system attacks the joints, causing pain, swelling, and damage. Tocilizumab is a medicine that can control the disease well, but doctors and patients often face an important question: when can it be safely stopped? In this study, we reviewed 97 patients with rheumatoid arthritis whose disease was well controlled before they stopped tocilizumab. We then followed them for 12 months to see who remained stable and who had a return of symptoms. We found that a little more than half of the patients had a relapse within 1 year after stopping treatment. Two factors were especially important. First, patients who stayed on tocilizumab for a longer time were less likely to relapse. Second, patients who had a positive anti-citrullinated protein antibody blood test were more likely to relapse. Our analysis suggested that about 200 days of treatment may be an important time point. Patients who stopped treatment before this were much more likely to have their disease come back. We also developed a simple tool based on treatment duration and antibody status that could separate patients into low-, medium-, and high-risk groups. These results suggest that stopping tocilizumab too early may increase the chance of relapse, especially in patients with a positive antibody test. This may help doctors and patients make more informed decisions about treatment withdrawal. However, because this was a single-center retrospective study, larger studies are needed to confirm these findings.

items.titleZh: 托珠单抗停药前治疗持续时间与类风湿关节炎复发风险的限制性立方样条分析
items.abstractZh: 托珠单抗（TCZ）是一种白细胞介素-6受体抑制剂，对中重度类风湿关节炎（RA）有效。然而，TCZ停药后维持缓解仍具挑战性，且停药前所需治疗持续时间以最小化复发风险尚不明确。为确定RA患者中与较低复发风险相关的TCZ停药前治疗持续时间阈值。这是一项回顾性研究，纳入97例在疾病稳定控制后停用静脉TCZ的RA患者。我们回顾性分析了97例在TCZ停药前达到缓解或低疾病活动度的RA患者。主要结局是停药后12个月内复发。Cox比例风险回归识别独立预测因素，而限制性立方样条（RCS）模型评估治疗持续时间与复发风险之间的非线性关联。开发了一个简化风险分层工具，并使用自助重抽样进行内部验证。在97例疾病稳定控制后停用TCZ的RA患者中，大多数为生物制剂初治（98.9%），平均病程为72.9±52.7个月，合并使用甲氨蝶呤和羟氯喹的患者分别占73.2%和47.4%。在12个月随访期间，54例患者（55.7%）复发。TCZ治疗持续时间是独立保护因素（调整后HR=0.892/月，p=0.002），而抗环瓜氨酸肽抗体（ACPA）阳性与复发风险增加相关（调整后HR=2.122，p=0.031）。RCS分析显示L形非线性关系，经验推导出约200天的持续时间阈值与较低复发风险相关。一个简化评分，对ACPA阳性和TCZ持续时间<200天各赋1分，将患者分为低风险（0分）、中风险（1分）和高风险（2分）组，复发率分别为27.3%、53.8%和91.7%；该模型显示出可接受的区分度（AUC=0.76）。较长的TCZ治疗持续时间和ACPA阴性与TCZ停药后较低的复发风险相关。约200天的治疗持续时间可作为常规实践中风险分层停药决策的临床参考阈值，但停药后的疾病控制应在持续背景治疗的背景下解读，而非确认的无药物缓解。类风湿关节炎中，托珠单抗在停药前应使用多久？类风湿关节炎是一种长期疾病，免疫系统攻击关节，导致疼痛、肿胀和损伤。托珠单抗是一种能很好控制疾病的药物，但医生和患者常面临一个重要问题：何时可以安全停药？在本研究中，我们回顾了97例在停用托珠单抗前疾病控制良好的类风湿关节炎患者。随后我们随访12个月，观察哪些患者保持稳定，哪些患者症状复发。我们发现，略超过一半的患者在停药后1年内复发。两个因素尤为重要。首先，使用托珠单抗时间较长的患者复发可能性较低。其次，抗环瓜氨酸肽抗体血液检测阳性的患者复发可能性更高。我们的分析提示，约200天的治疗可能是一个重要时间点。在此时间点前停药的患者疾病复发的可能性大得多。我们还基于治疗持续时间和抗体状态开发了一个简单工具，可将患者分为低、中、高风险组。这些结果表明，过早停用托珠单抗可能增加复发机会，尤其是在抗体检测阳性的患者中。这可能有助于医生和患者做出更明智的停药决策。然而，由于这是一项单中心回顾性研究，需要更大规模的研究来证实这些发现。

items.title: Life-Threatening Variceal Bleeding in Antisynthetase Syndrome: Nodular Regenerative Hyperplasia and Porto-Sinusoidal Vascular Disorder.
items.abstract: Antisynthetase syndrome (ASyS) is an autoimmune disorder that may be associated with hepatic involvement, such as nodular regenerative hyperplasia (NRH), a histologic manifestation of porto-sinusoidal vascular disorder, and complications such as variceal bleeding despite preserved liver function. We report a case of life-threatening variceal hemorrhage due to NRH-associated porto-sinusoidal vascular disorder in a patient with ASyS. This case highlights NRH as a cause of severe gastrointestinal bleeding in ASyS and underscores the need for diagnostic and management strategies distinct from those used in cirrhosis.

items.title: Investigating the relationship between psoriatic arthritis, multiple long-term conditions, treatment burden and adverse clinical outcomes: A systematic review protocol.
items.abstract: Psoriatic arthritis (PsA) is a chronic inflammatory musculoskeletal disease associated with psoriasis, affecting an estimated 0.13% of adults worldwide. People living with PsA often experience multiple long-term conditions (MLTCs) or multimorbidity (the presence of two or more long-term health conditions), such as hypertension, diabetes, obesity, and metabolic syndrome. Multimorbidity and treatment burden which is the workload of healthcare experienced by individuals and its impact on wellbeing may exacerbate poor health outcomes and complicate disease management in PsA. However, the influence of MLTCs and/or treatment burden on adverse health-related outcomes in this population remains poorly understood. This systematic review protocol will outline the methods to evaluate the current evidence regarding the impact, if any, of MLTCs and/or treatment burden on mortality and other adverse health-related outcomes in individuals with PsA. Systematic review of the literature. The following databases will be searched: MEDLINE, EMBASE, CINAHL, PsycINFO, and Scopus. Longitudinal quantitative studies will be eligible for inclusion. Study selection will follow predefined eligibility criteria, and methodological quality and risk of bias will be assessed using the Cochrane Quality in Prognostic Studies tool. A narrative synthesis will be undertaken, and meta-analysis will be considered where appropriate. This protocol follows the Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses Protocols (PRISMA-P) 2015 guidelines. Understanding the impact of MLTCs and/or treatment burden on health-related outcomes in PsA is essential for improving future clinical management. This review will help identify existing knowledge gaps and advance precision medicine strategies to improve health-related outcomes for individuals living with PsA.

items.titleZh: 银屑病关节炎、多种长期疾病、治疗负担与不良临床结局之间关系的调查：一项系统评价方案
items.abstractZh: 银屑病关节炎（PsA）是一种与银屑病相关的慢性炎症性肌肉骨骼疾病，影响全球约0.13%的成年人。患有PsA的人常经历多种长期疾病（MLTCs）或多病共存（存在两种或多种长期健康状况），如高血压、糖尿病、肥胖和代谢综合征。多病共存和治疗负担（即个体经历的医疗保健工作量及其对健康的影响）可能加剧不良健康结局并使PsA的疾病管理复杂化。然而，MLTCs和/或治疗负担对该人群不良健康相关结局的影响仍知之甚少。本系统评价方案将概述评估当前关于MLTCs和/或治疗负担对PsA患者死亡率及其他不良健康相关结局影响（如有）的证据的方法。文献系统评价。将检索以下数据库：MEDLINE、EMBASE、CINAHL、PsycINFO和Scopus。纵向定量研究将符合纳入条件。研究选择将遵循预定义的纳入标准，并使用Cochrane预后研究质量工具评估方法学质量和偏倚风险。将进行叙述性综合，并在适当时考虑荟萃分析。本方案遵循2015年系统评价和荟萃分析首选报告项目（PRISMA-P）指南。了解MLTCs和/或治疗负担对PsA健康相关结局的影响对于改善未来临床管理至关重要。本综述将有助于识别现有知识空白，并推进精准医学策略以改善PsA患者的健康相关结局。

items.title: Shengjiangsan Upregulates miR-328-3p to Inhibit MAP3K9 in the Treatment of Sjogren Disease: A Bioinformatics Analysis.
items.abstract: Conventional treatments for Sjögren's disease (SjD) have limited therapeutic efficacy, whereas Shengjiangsan (SJS) has been reported to ameliorate SjD, although further research is lacking. The aim of the present study was to investigate the effects exerted by, and underlying mechanisms of, SJS in the treatment of SjD through miRNA sequencing, bioinformatics analysis, and in vitro and in vivo experiments. Key miRNAs and their target genes involved in the effects of SJS on SjD were identified through microRNA sequencing and bioinformatics analysis, and their targeting relationships were verified using a dual-luciferase assay. Animal and cell experiments were conducted to demonstrate the efficacy and underlying mechanisms of SJS in treating SjD. RNA sequencing showed that the expression of miR-328-3p in the model group with SjD was low and upregulated after SJS treatment, reaching levels comparable to those in the control group. Expression of its target gene, MAP3K9, was elevated in the model group and decreased after treatment. Simultaneously, dual-luciferase assays verified the targeting relationship between miR-328-3p and MAP3K9, and cell transfection experiments demonstrated that SJS inhibited MAP3K9 expression by increasing miR-328-3p levels. Additionally, experiments showed that SJS significantly increased the salivary flow rate in SjD mice, reduced inflammatory infiltration of SG lymphocytes, enhanced AQP5 protein expression, and decreased serum levels of inflammatory factors such as IgG, BAFF, IL-6, and IFN-γ. SJS may targets miR-328-3p to inhibit MAP3K9 expression, alleviate inflammation in NOD/Ltj mice, reduce pathological damage in the SG, increase saliva secretion, and improve SjD symptoms.

items.titleZh: 升姜散通过上调miR-328-3p抑制MAP3K9治疗干燥综合征：一项生物信息学分析。
items.abstractZh: 干燥综合征（SjD）的传统治疗方法疗效有限，而升姜散（SJS）已被报道可改善SjD，但尚缺乏进一步研究。本研究旨在通过miRNA测序、生物信息学分析以及体内外实验，探讨SJS治疗SjD的作用及潜在机制。通过microRNA测序和生物信息学分析，鉴定了SJS对SjD作用中涉及的关键miRNA及其靶基因，并利用双荧光素酶实验验证了它们的靶向关系。通过动物和细胞实验证明了SJS治疗SjD的疗效及潜在机制。RNA测序显示，SjD模型组中miR-328-3p的表达较低，经SJS治疗后上调，达到与对照组相当的水平。其靶基因MAP3K9的表达在模型组中升高，治疗后降低。同时，双荧光素酶实验验证了miR-328-3p与MAP3K9之间的靶向关系，细胞转染实验表明SJS通过增加miR-328-3p水平抑制MAP3K9表达。此外，实验显示SJS显著增加了SjD小鼠的唾液流率，减少了SG淋巴细胞的炎症浸润，增强了AQP5蛋白表达，并降低了血清中IgG、BAFF、IL-6和IFN-γ等炎症因子的水平。SJS可能靶向miR-328-3p抑制MAP3K9表达，减轻NOD/Ltj小鼠的炎症，减少SG的病理损伤，增加唾液分泌，改善SjD症状。

items.title: Optimizing the use of patient-reported outcome measures in axial spondyloarthritis: a mixed-methods study from the QUESTIONAX Project.
items.abstract: Patient-reported outcome measures (PROMs) are essential for assessing disease activity, functioning, and quality of life in axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA). However, despite guideline recommendations, their integration into routine clinical practice remains inconsistent, partly due to challenges in comprehension, interpretation, and perceived usefulness. The aim of this QUESTIONAX study was to assess the use of existing PROMs in axSpA and to identify opportunities to improve their applicability in routine clinical practice. A mixed methods study was conducted to explore the use and understanding of PROMs in axSpA. Cognitive interviews were conducted with patients to assess how they comprehend and respond to commonly used PROMs (BASDAI, BASFI, ASAS-HI, and disease-activity numeric rating scale). Semi-structured interviews with healthcare professionals were also performed. Additionally, online surveys were distributed to broader samples of patients and professionals to explore PROM use, perceived purpose, and associated difficulties. Qualitative data were analyzed descriptively to identify recurring themes and patterns. Patients reported frequent completion of PROMs but showed limited understanding of their purpose, scoring, and relevance to clinical decision-making. Certain BASDAI items, particularly those related to peripheral pain, caused confusion. ASAS-HI was less familiar and raised concerns about clarity and relevance. Healthcare professionals were generally familiar with PROMs but reported inconsistent use, mainly due to time constraints and difficulties interpreting scores. Both groups highlighted the need for clearer instructions, improved formatting, and better integration into clinical workflows. Although PROMs are valuable tools in axSpA, their effective use is limited by barriers related to comprehension and implementation. Improving clarity, education, and workflow integration-without altering validated content-may enhance their usability and clinical impact.

items.titleZh: 优化患者报告结局测量在轴性脊柱关节炎中的应用：来自QUESTIONAX项目的混合方法研究
items.abstractZh: 患者报告结局测量（PROMs）对于评估轴性脊柱关节炎（axSpA）的疾病活动度、功能和生活质量至关重要。然而，尽管有指南推荐，它们在日常临床实践中的整合仍不一致，部分原因在于理解、解释和感知有用性方面的挑战。本QUESTIONAX研究旨在评估现有PROMs在axSpA中的使用情况，并确定改善其在常规临床实践中适用性的机会。采用混合方法研究探讨PROMs在axSpA中的使用和理解。对患者进行认知访谈，评估他们如何理解和回答常用PROMs（BASDAI、BASFI、ASAS-HI和疾病活动数字评定量表）。还对医疗专业人员进行半结构化访谈。此外，向更广泛的患者和专业人员样本分发在线调查，以探讨PROM的使用、感知目的和相关困难。定性数据进行描述性分析，以识别重复出现的主题和模式。患者报告经常完成PROMs，但对其目的、评分和与临床决策的相关性理解有限。某些BASDAI条目，特别是与周围性疼痛相关的条目，引起混淆。ASAS-HI不太熟悉，并引发了对清晰度和相关性的担忧。医疗专业人员通常熟悉PROMs，但报告使用不一致，主要由于时间限制和评分解释困难。两组均强调需要更清晰的说明、改进的格式以及更好地整合到临床工作流程中。尽管PROMs是axSpA中的有价值工具，但其有效使用受到理解和实施障碍的限制。在不改变已验证内容的情况下，提高清晰度、教育和工作流程整合可能增强其可用性和临床影响。

items.title: Restoring immune homeostasis in the spinal microenvironment: targeting mechano-inflammation and immunometabolic reprogramming.
items.abstract: Chronic inflammatory diseases of the spine, typified by axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) and intervertebral disc degeneration (IDD), impose a substantial burden through refractory pain and irreversible structural remodelling (pathological ossification or fibrosis). Although current anti-inflammatory therapies can alleviate symptoms, their capacity to arrest structural deterioration remains limited, underscoring the constraints of approaches that target inflammatory cytokines in isolation. This therapeutic intractability is rooted in the distinctive spinal microenvironment: high mechanical loading at the enthesis and the hypoxic niche of the intervertebral disc (IVD), through mechano-inflammatory coupling and maladaptive metabolic adaptation, actively drive pathological reprogramming of immune cells and create a barrier to the restoration of homeostasis. In this Review, we dissect the multidimensional crosstalk among biomechanics, metabolism and immunity, and delineate the central roles of Human leukocyte antigen B27 (HLA-B27) associated stress, metabolic reprogramming, and osteo-immune crosstalk in sustaining chronic inflammation. On this basis, we propose a paradigm shift from suppressing downstream mediators to modulating upstream microenvironments. We suggest that targeting metabolic checkpoints, interrupting mechanotransduction, and applying epigenetic interventions may promote inflammatory resolution and reset matrix homeostasis, thereby offering new strategies to restore spinal immune equilibrium and prevent structural failure.

items.titleZh: 恢复脊柱微环境中的免疫稳态：靶向机械炎症和免疫代谢重编程
items.abstractZh: 以中轴型脊柱关节炎（axSpA）和椎间盘退变（IDD）为代表的脊柱慢性炎症性疾病，通过顽固性疼痛和不可逆的结构重塑（病理性骨化或纤维化）造成沉重负担。尽管当前的抗炎治疗可缓解症状，但其阻止结构恶化的能力仍然有限，这凸显了仅靶向炎症细胞因子的方法的局限性。这种治疗难治性根源于独特的脊柱微环境：附着点处的高机械负荷和椎间盘（IVD）的缺氧微环境，通过机械炎症耦合和适应不良的代谢适应，主动驱动免疫细胞的病理性重编程，并形成恢复稳态的屏障。在本综述中，我们剖析了生物力学、代谢和免疫之间的多维串扰，并描述了人类白细胞抗原B27（HLA-B27）相关应激、代谢重编程和骨免疫串扰在维持慢性炎症中的核心作用。在此基础上，我们提出从抑制下游介质转向调节上游微环境的范式转变。我们建议，靶向代谢检查点、中断机械转导以及应用表观遗传干预可能促进炎症消退并重置基质稳态，从而为恢复脊柱免疫平衡和预防结构衰竭提供新策略。

items.title: Experimental verification and PK/PD modeling of selective drug absorption via acupoint administration in rabbit model of rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: The administration of drugs at specific acupoints is a traditional practice in Chinese medicine, yet scientific evidence supporting its pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic (PK/PD) advantages remains limited. This study aimed to evaluate the transdermal absorption and therapeutic effects of miRNA55 when delivered via microneedles at different acupoints in a rabbit model of rheumatoid arthritis (RA). An RA model was established in New Zealand rabbits using ovalbumin-Freund's complete adjuvant emulsion. miRNA55 was encapsulated in cationic liposomes and combined with hyaluronic acid for microneedle preparation. Microneedles were applied at classical acupoint (ST36), atypical acupoints (GB34), and non-acupoint areas above the knee joint of the rabbits (avoiding ST35). Drug concentrations in the joint cavity fluid were assessed by microdialysis and enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA). The encapsulation rate and in vitro release of miRNA55 were analyzed by UV spectrophotometry. PK/PD modeling was conducted using WinNonlin 8.1, with IL-1β, TNF- α , and IL-6 as pharmacodynamic markers. The protein expression of TNF-α, MMP-1, and MMP-3 was assessed using western blotting (WB), and histopathological changes in the synovial tissue were observed by hematoxylin-eosin (H&E) staining. miRNA55 concentrations in the joint cavity were the highest in the ST36 group, followed by the GB34 and non-acupoint groups. This observation indicated that the degree of drug absorption. PK/PD modeling showed higher efficacy value for ST36 across all three cytokines. For IL-1β, Emax model for ST36 was E = 81.09 C e 169.56 + C e ; for TNF- α , E = 70.35 C e 136.15 + C e ; and for IL-6, E = 69.93 C e 167.88 + C e , all higher than those observed in the GB34 and non-acupoint groups. WB analysis confirmed lower expression level of inflammatory proteins in the ST36 group. H&E staining showed reduced synovial erosion and lymphokine infiltration in the ST36 group compared to those in the other two groups. This study demonstrates that transdermal administration of miRNA55 via microneedle at specific acupoints enhances drug absorption and improves therapeutic outcomes in a rabbit model of RA. These findings support the traditional concept of acupoint specificity and offer a scientific basis for integrating acupoint-based drug delivery in modern RA treatment strategies.

items.titleZh: 兔类风湿性关节炎模型中穴位给药选择性药物吸收的实验验证及PK/PD建模
items.abstractZh: 在特定穴位给药是中医学的传统实践，但支持其药代动力学和药效学（PK/PD）优势的科学证据仍然有限。本研究旨在评估在兔类风湿性关节炎（RA）模型中，通过微针在不同穴位递送miRNA55的经皮吸收和治疗效果。使用卵清蛋白-弗氏完全佐剂乳剂在新西兰兔中建立RA模型。将miRNA55包裹在阳离子脂质体中，并与透明质酸结合制备微针。微针应用于兔膝关节上方的经典穴位（ST36）、非典型穴位（GB34）和非穴位区域（避开ST35）。通过微透析和酶联免疫吸附试验（ELISA）评估关节腔液中的药物浓度。通过紫外分光光度法（UV）分析miRNA55的包封率和体外释放。使用WinNonlin 8.1进行PK/PD建模，以IL-1β、TNF-α和IL-6作为药效学标志物。使用蛋白质印迹法（WB）评估TNF-α、MMP-1和MMP-3的蛋白表达，并通过苏木精-伊红（H&E）染色观察滑膜组织的组织病理学变化。ST36组关节腔中miRNA55浓度最高，其次是GB34组和非穴位组。这一观察结果表明了药物吸收的程度。PK/PD建模显示，ST36组在所有三种细胞因子中均具有更高的药效值。对于IL-1β，ST36组的Emax模型为E = 81.09 Ce / (169.56 + Ce)；对于TNF-α，E = 70.35 Ce / (136.15 + Ce)；对于IL-6，E = 69.93 Ce / (167.88 + Ce)，均高于GB34组和非穴位组。WB分析证实ST36组炎症蛋白表达水平较低。H&E染色显示，与其他两组相比，ST36组滑膜侵蚀和淋巴因子浸润减少。本研究表明，在兔RA模型中，通过微针在特定穴位经皮给药miRNA55可增强药物吸收并改善治疗效果。这些发现支持了穴位特异性的传统概念，并为将基于穴位的药物递送整合到现代RA治疗策略中提供了科学依据。

items.title: Unexpected intercostal fusion of total thoracic fracture dislocation with ankylosing spondylitis.
items.abstract: Fractures associated with ankylosing spondylitis (AS) are often challenging due to long-segment rigidity and severe displacement. Here, a 50-year-old male presented with a total T10 fracture/dislocation. After posterior fusion instrumentation was removed due to wound dehiscence, spontaneous intercostal fusion between the T10 and T11 ribs provided sufficient stability. A 50-year-old male with AS after sustaining a severe T10 fracture/dislocation underwent an emergency posterior fusion. At surgery, the dural sac was ruptured and the spinal cord was completely transected. The thecal sac was tied off, and the patient underwent an instrumented T10-T11 fusion despite the inability to attain a significant reduction and the lack of adequate bone mass for the arthrodesis. Within 6 months, wound dehiscence due to a pressure sore resulted in implant exposure necessitating its removal. During that second surgery, there was prominent osseous bridging between the adjacent 10 th and 11 th ribs which appeared to adequately stabilize the spine. Thoracic spine fractures in patients with AS are not always amenable to sufficient spinal correction/instrumented fusion. Here, a 50-year-old male with AS following a T10 total fracture/dislocation, whose fusion construct failed, was sufficiently stabilized secondary to spontaneous T10-T11 intercostal fusion.

items.titleZh: 强直性脊柱炎全胸椎骨折脱位意外肋间融合
items.abstractZh: 强直性脊柱炎（AS）相关的骨折常因长节段僵硬和严重移位而具有挑战性。本文报告一例50岁男性，表现为T10完全骨折/脱位。因伤口裂开移除后路融合内固定物后，T10和T11肋骨之间的自发性肋间融合提供了足够的稳定性。一名50岁男性AS患者在遭受严重T10骨折/脱位后接受了急诊后路融合术。手术中，硬膜囊破裂，脊髓完全横断。结扎了硬膜囊，尽管无法实现显著复位且缺乏足够的骨量进行关节融合，患者仍接受了T10-T11内固定融合术。6个月内，因压疮导致的伤口裂开使植入物暴露，需要将其移除。在第二次手术中，相邻的第10和第11肋骨之间出现了明显的骨桥，似乎足以稳定脊柱。AS患者的胸椎骨折并不总是适合充分的脊柱矫正/内固定融合。本文中，一名50岁男性AS患者在T10完全骨折/脱位后，其融合结构失败，但由于自发性T10-T11肋间融合而获得了足够的稳定。

items.title: Ankylosing Spondylitis Presenting as a Severe Kyphotic Deformity Without Pain: A Case Report and Literature Review.
items.abstract: Ankylosing spondylitis (AS) is a chronic inflammatory disease predominantly affecting the axial skeleton and sacroiliac joints. Progressive structural remodeling may lead to syndesmophyte formation, spinal ankylosis, and the characteristic "bamboo spine" appearance. In advanced stages, spinal deformities and functional impairment may occur. We report the case of a 32-year-old male presenting with progressive spinal deformity and cosmetic concern without significant current pain. The deformity had progressively developed since adolescence, beginning at the age of 15, and was initially associated with alternating hip pain. Clinical examination revealed marked cervicothoracic hyperkyphosis, sagittal imbalance, left shoulder elevation, and right pelvic tilt. Spinal mobility assessment demonstrated severe limitation, with a Schober index of 1 cm and thoracic expansion reduced to 4 cm. Imaging studies revealed a bamboo spine appearance with fusion of the posterior vertebral elements, while pelvic radiography demonstrated bilateral sacroiliac ankylosis. Laboratory investigations confirmed HLA-B27 positivity. Pulmonary function tests showed a restrictive ventilatory pattern. Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Disease Activity Index (BASDAI) and Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Functional Index (BASFI) scores indicated clinically significant disease activity and moderate functional impairment, respectively. The patient was enrolled in a multidisciplinary management program including motor and respiratory rehabilitation, rheumatological follow-up, and referral for surgical evaluation of the fixed kyphotic deformity. This case highlights an advanced presentation of AS presenting primarily with spinal deformity rather than active pain. It emphasizes the importance of early recognition and regular assessment of spinal mobility in order to prevent irreversible structural damage and long-term functional impairment.

items.titleZh: 以严重后凸畸形且无疼痛为首发表现的强直性脊柱炎：病例报告及文献复习
items.abstractZh: 强直性脊柱炎（AS）是一种主要累及中轴骨骼和骶髂关节的慢性炎症性疾病。进行性结构重塑可能导致韧带骨赘形成、脊柱强直以及特征性的“竹节样脊柱”表现。在晚期阶段，可能出现脊柱畸形和功能障碍。我们报告一例32岁男性患者，表现为进行性脊柱畸形和外观问题，但无明显当前疼痛。畸形自15岁起逐渐发展，最初伴有交替性髋部疼痛。临床检查显示明显的颈胸段过度后凸、矢状面失衡、左肩抬高和右骨盆倾斜。脊柱活动度评估显示严重受限，Schober指数为1 cm，胸廓扩张度降至4 cm。影像学检查显示竹节样脊柱伴后部椎体融合，而骨盆X线片显示双侧骶髂关节强直。实验室检查证实HLA-B27阳性。肺功能检查显示限制性通气模式。Bath强直性脊柱炎疾病活动指数（BASDAI）和Bath强直性脊柱炎功能指数（BASFI）评分分别表明临床显著疾病活动和中度功能障碍。患者被纳入多学科管理计划，包括运动和呼吸康复、风湿病随访以及转诊进行固定后凸畸形的手术评估。本病例强调了AS以脊柱畸形而非活动性疼痛为主要表现的晚期表现。它强调了早期识别和定期评估脊柱活动度的重要性，以防止不可逆的结构损伤和长期功能障碍。

items.title: Antineutrophil Cytoplasmic Antibody (ANCA)-Positive Eosinophilic Granulomatosis With Polyangiitis Presenting With Refractory Asthma, Mononeuritis Multiplex, and Cutaneous Vasculitis: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis (EGPA) is a rare antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody (ANCA)-associated small-vessel vasculitis characterised by asthma, eosinophilia, and eosinophil-rich tissue inflammation. Early diagnosis is often difficult because initial features may resemble uncontrolled asthma or other eosinophilic lung diseases. We report a 66-year-old man with adult-onset asthma who presented with four months of progressive dyspnoea, constitutional symptoms, peripheral neuropathy, and cutaneous vasculitis. Investigations showed marked eosinophilia (19.1 × 10⁹/L), raised inflammatory markers, elevated creatine kinase and lactate dehydrogenase, and markedly elevated IgG4. Cross-sectional imaging showed calcified mediastinal and hilar lymph nodes without pulmonary infiltrates. Extensive infectious and haematological investigations were unrevealing. Anti-myeloperoxidase antibodies were positive, and skin biopsy confirmed small-vessel vasculitis with eosinophilic infiltration. A diagnosis of ANCA-positive EGPA was made. The patient was treated with high-dose corticosteroids, but symptom recurrence during steroid taper prompted escalation to intravenous cyclophosphamide for organ-threatening neurological involvement. This case highlights the importance of considering EGPA in patients with refractory asthma, eosinophilia, and systemic features even in the absence of pulmonary infiltrates. Early recognition and multidisciplinary management are essential to reduce irreversible organ damage.

items.title: Microscopic Polyangiitis With Temporal Artery Involvement Mimicking Giant Cell Arteritis.
items.abstract: A 63-year-old woman presented with a four-month history of bilateral hearing loss and three months of progressive, painful peripheral neuropathy. Her clinical course was complicated by deep vein thrombosis with pulmonary emboli and an incomplete response to initial empiric glucocorticoid therapy. Following glucocorticoid taper, she developed temporal headaches, jaw claudication, and scalp tenderness, raising concern for giant cell arteritis (GCA). Laboratory evaluation revealed markedly elevated inflammatory markers (erythrocyte sedimentation rate and C-reactive protein), microcytic anemia, mild hematuria, and strongly positive myeloperoxidase-antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody (MPO-ANCA) by antigen-specific immunoassay with negative proteinase-3 (PR3)-ANCA. Temporal artery biopsy demonstrated transmural inflammation affecting all vessel layers without giant cells or granulomata. The combination of multisystem small-vessel involvement, MPO-ANCA seropositivity with negative PR3-ANCA, and characteristic histopathological findings established the diagnosis of microscopic polyangiitis (MPA) with temporal arteritis rather than granulomatosis with polyangiitis (GPA) or GCA. Treatment with high-dose glucocorticoids (prednisone 80 mg daily), avacopan (30 mg twice daily), and rituximab (375 mg/m² weekly for four weeks) resulted in rapid improvement of constitutional and cranial symptoms. This case highlights the importance of integrating MPO-ANCA serology and histopathological findings when temporal arteritis is the presenting feature of systemic vasculitis. It illustrates the utility of avacopan-based, glucocorticoid-sparing combination immunosuppression in this context.
